channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Early Detection of Chronic Kidney Disease: The Importance of Testing
item.description: The article highlights the dangers of chronic kidney disease (CKD), often referred to as a 'silent killer' due to its lack of symptoms. Dr. Alan Kaplan’s personal experience illustrates how undiagnose...

item.title: A 1867 Photograph of the James Brothers and Fletch Taylor: Bonds Forged in Civil War Guerrilla Warfare
item.description: This article analyzes a rare 1867 photograph capturing Frank and Jesse James alongside Fletch Taylor, Confederate guerrillas who fought in Missouri's guerrilla bands during the Civil War. The image, t...

item.title: Star Trek actor Anson Mount surprises Joy Behar with unexpected on-air kiss
item.description: Star Trek actor Anson Mount, 53, made headlines during a recent episode of The View by surprising host Joy Behar, 83, with an unexpected on-air kiss. The incident occurred during a live segment, spark...

item.title: CJP Protest Escalates with Clashes and Metro Closures
item.description: The CJP protest in Delhi witnessed heightened tensions on July 23, 2026, with clashes between protesters and police on Sansad Marg. The Delhi Police reported injuries to five officers, including two A...

item.title: Man Detained in M-Pesa Shop After Alleged Fraud

item.title: Iran-US conflict escalates as Houthi attacks disrupt oil shipments and spark tensions
item.description: The Iran-US conflict has intensified as Houthi rebels, backed by Iran, launched attacks on two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea, threatening global energy supplies. The Houthis claimed the vessels vio...

item.title: Supreme Court Refuses to Address Police Excess in Delhi Protests

item.title: Defence Department withholds conflict of interest documents in $3 billion military property sale

item.title: Inter Miami Faces MLS Investigation Over Casemiro Signing
item.description: Inter Miami is under investigation by Major League Soccer (MLS) after signing Brazilian midfielder Casemiro. The probe centers on discovery rights, a rule that allows clubs to prioritize signing speci...

item.title: UK Inflation Rate Surpasses 4.3% in March 2023, Reflecting Economic Challenges
item.description: The UK's inflation rate rose to 4.3% in March 2023, marking a significant increase from the previous month's 3.9%. This surge is attributed to a combination of factors, including rising energy prices,...

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays extend winning streak to three with 4-2 victory over Blue Jays
